domain_entity.brief: A single execution of a named workflow.
domain_entity.description:
Tracks the lifecycle of a workflow execution, including its type, status,
the serialised request that triggered it, and any result or error produced.
Instances are append-mostly; status transitions are the primary mutation.

primary_key.description: UUID primary key for the workflow instance.

columns.name: tenant_id
columns.description: Tenant that owns this workflow instance.

columns.name: state_id
columns.description: FK to the FSM state record (ores_workflow_fsm_states_tbl) for this instance.

columns.name: request_json
columns.description: Serialised JSON payload of the originating request.

columns.name: result_json
columns.description: Serialised JSON result, populated on successful completion.

columns.name: error
columns.description: Human-readable error message, populated on failure.

columns.name: correlation_id
columns.description: Distributed tracing correlation ID (Nats-Correlation-Id header value).

columns.name: created_by
columns.description: Username or service identity that initiated the workflow.

columns.name: current_step_index
columns.description: Zero-based index of the step currently being executed.

columns.name: step_count
columns.description: Total number of steps in this workflow definition.

columns.name: materialised_steps_json
columns.description: JSON snapshot of the step sequence built at instance start. Prevents a non-deterministic build_steps from reshaping an in-flight workflow after a service restart.

columns.name: completed_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the workflow reached a terminal state.

columns.name: last_event_at
columns.description: Timestamp of the most recent step-completed event processed.
